## Safety note

If this may be a vulnerability or could expose secrets, delete data outside the intended scope, bypass approval, or fake success, do not open a public issue. Please follow [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md) instead.

## Additional context

Add logs, screenshots, or a minimal synthetic repro. Do not attach personal data, credentials, tokens, or real backup payloads.
